author: YOUR_NAME
name: Mixed-Precision QAT: Int5 MLP + Int6 Attn
blurb: Adds mixed-precision QAT (int5 STE for MLP, int6 STE for attention/bigram-proj) on top of the full SOTA stack (BigramHash-10240, SmearGate, OrthoInit, Muon WD=0.04, SWA, sliding-window eval, zstd-22). QAT clip ranges exactly match the post-training export quantization, closing the train/export gap.
